description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake lavishly covered in white whipped cream, with a snowy, textured appearance. Four large, fresh strawberries, dusted with powdered sugar, are evenly spaced around the top edge. At the center sits a detailed edible house made from chocolate, cookies, and wafers, complete with a pitched roof, chimney, and small animal-shaped decorations at the front. The house is dusted with powdered sugar to mimic snow, enhancing the wintry, festive theme. The cake's surface is highly textured, with piped cream forming decorative swirls and ridges along the sides. The overall presentation is whimsical and inviting, reminiscent of a winter holiday scene.
description: A round, whipped cream-covered cake topped with strawberries and a detailed edible house, dusted to resemble a snowy winter scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing the house's entrance, four strawberries, and animal-shaped decorations nestled in whipped cream.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's roof, chimney, and the alignment of strawberries around the cake.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the house's open doorway, steps, and more visible animal figures.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the house, chimney, and the arrangement of strawberries and cream.
